problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Psychedelic-induced. Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor directly addresses this.
